narrative:
Nile Township has 1,573 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points.
